extraction_scope: Foundational rules from the early visible lessons only.
warnings: This package is source-modeled and not human-reviewed for production use.
The source PDF is image-only in this branch, so exact page numbers were not machine-extracted.
Rules preserve ambiguity warnings where the workbook supports only limited or context-sensitive claims.
Nothing in this package is runtime_active.
future_integration_note: This package is an upstream source-modeled layer for future reviewed promotion into data/foundations/dikduk. It does not change runtime behavior in this branch.
